import api from'./axiosInstance';// Get all active categories with worker counts
export const getAllCategories=()=>api.get('/categories');// Get popular categories
export const getPopularCategories=function(){let limit=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:10;return api.get('/categories/popular',{params:{limit}});};// Get single category + workers in it
export const getCategoryById=categoryId=>api.get("/categories/".concat(categoryId));
